description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a walled rectangular lot, featuring a dark, multi-faceted hip roof with visible chimneys and dormers. The main structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including several trees, shrubs, and two distinct garden plots—one with rows of flowering plants and another with what appears to be a vegetable or vineyard section. The house has a prominent front porch with steps leading to a pathway, and a driveway runs along one side, leading to a detached garage or shed at the rear. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of wood and stone, with large windows and a central entrance. The property is bordered by a stone wall and includes a small greenhouse or utility shed in one corner. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural residential environment with ample outdoor space for gardening and recreation.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, surrounded by gardens, trees, and a stone wall, featuring a front porch and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, and landscaped garden with trees and a pathway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive garden plots, the side of the house, and the detached garage at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the full extent of the garden plots, and the greenhouse or shed in the corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more trees, the side entrance, and the stone wall enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
